nasb.text: However, because by this deed you have given occasion to the enemies of the Lord to blaspheme, the child also that is born to you shall surely die.”

esv.text: Nevertheless, because by this deed you have utterly scorned the Lord, the child who is born to you shall die.”

cnv.text: 只是因為你作了這事，使耶和華的仇敵大得褻瀆的機會，所以你所生的兒子必定死。”

ccb.text: 但你做的丑事给了仇敌亵渎耶和华的机会，所以你这个孩子必定死。”
